title: QAVerdict
description: Structured QA verdict produced by a QA agent after every task verification. Not just pass/fail — includes defect classification, novelty detection, and trust score impact. Generic, product-agnostic.

verdictId.description: ULID primary key for this verdict.

taskId.description: ULID of the AgentTaskManifest this verdict evaluates.

qaDecision.description: Overall QA decision. block_release = hard stop, cannot proceed without fix.

defectClass.description: Classification of the defect found. Null if qaDecision is pass.

novelty.description: Whether this defect has been seen before. Repeat defects trigger escalation rules.

repeatReferenceIds.description: References to prior FailureRecords if novelty is 'repeat'.

file.description: File path where the finding was observed.

findings.description: Detailed findings from the QA review. At least one finding required — even for pass, document what was verified.

recommendedPreventionArtifact.description: Suggested prevention artifact type and location if defects were found.

missingEval.description: Eval scenario that should exist but does not. Surfaces gaps in the eval corpus.

recommendedEscalation.description: Where this issue should be escalated if not resolved at QA level.

agentId.description: Generic agent role whose trust score is affected.

direction.description: Direction of the trust score adjustment.

reason.description: Why the trust score should change.

trustScoreDelta.description: Recommended trust score adjustment based on this verdict.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the verdict was produced.

correlationId.description: Correlation ID for event tracing across the audit log.
